seo.meta_title: Best WorkOS Alternatives for Next.js Developers (2026)
seo.meta_description: Looking for alternatives to WorkOS? Compare the top Next.js auth tools — Clerk, Kinde, Better Auth — and find the right fit for your project.
seo.og_title: Best Alternatives to WorkOS for Next.js
seo.og_description: Top WorkOS alternatives ranked by Next.js integration score, pricing, and developer experience.

hero.headline: Best WorkOS Alternatives for Next.js (2026)
hero.subheadline: WorkOS not quite right? Here are the top alternatives, ranked by how well they integrate with Next.js App Router.

intro_paragraphs: WorkOS is a solid choice for Next.js authentication — workos is an enterprise auth platform that provides sso, scim, and directory sync. But depending on your budget, team size, or feature requirements, one of these alternatives might be a better fit.

faq.question: Why would I choose something over WorkOS?
faq.answer: While WorkOS scores 5/10 for Next.js integration, other tools may offer better pricing at scale (Custom pricing (enterprise) with No free tier (enterprise sales)), different learning curves, or features that WorkOS lacks such as no free tier - requires sales conversation to get started, not designed for consumer auth or b2c applications.
